title: Nvidia’s open-source simulator trains surgical robots in under two minutes
excerpt: The hard part of medical robotics is not the robot. It is the practice. A surgical system needs thousands of attempts to learn a delicate task, and you cannot run those on real patients. Nvidia thinks the answer is to let the robot rehearse inside a simulated body, millions of times over. The company has […]
content_html:
The hard part of medical robotics is not the robot. It is the practice. A surgical system needs thousands of attempts to learn a delicate task, and you cannot run those on real patients. Nvidia thinks the answer is to let the robot rehearse inside a simulated body, millions of times over.

The company has released an open-source Medical Physics Simulation framework, part of its Isaac for Healthcare platform, HIT Consultant reported. It models how instruments interact with anatomy, so developers can train and stress-test physical-AI policies long before touching hardware.

The speed is the headline. By running 8,192 training environments in parallel on GPUs, Nvidia claims a startling speed-up. It cuts robotic policy training from over five hours to under two minutes. That is the difference between an overnight job and a coffee break.

The more consequential part is what the simulation produces: evidence. Because the framework is open, developers can see the data, models, and weights. They can use them to build the verifiable proof that medical regulators demand.

Two kinds of physics

The framework fuses two approaches. Classical physics, via Nvidia’s Warp and Newton engines, models the hard mechanics: friction, contact, and the resistance of tissue against a catheter or guidewire.

Generative AI physics, from a model called Cosmos-H Dreams, predicts the messier stuff, like how soft tissue deforms. It can even pipe in simulated fluoroscopy, X-ray, and ultrasound.

Who is already using it

The names give it weight. Surgical-robotics firms including Medtronic, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, and CMR Surgical are using the framework for surgical digital twins and endovascular training.

Chris Fryer, chief technology officer of CMR Surgical, said open-source models let firms “build on shared knowledge, accelerating responsible innovation.”

The catch

The generosity has a logic. Open-sourcing the tools makes Nvidia the standard infrastructure beneath the next generation of surgical robots, all of it running on Nvidia GPUs.

A simulation is also not a patient.

A policy that shines in a digital twin still has to prove itself in an operating theatre, and regulators have yet to say how much synthetic evidence they will accept.

Still, the direction is striking. The bottleneck in medical AI has been data, not ideas, and Nvidia has just handed the field a way around it, for free. If regulators agree that a robot trained in a virtual body is safe in a real one, the two-minute rehearsal could become the way surgical machines are built.

sentences.zh: 它甚至可以模拟透视、X 射线和超声波。

sentences.en: Surgical-robotics firms including Medtronic, Johnson & Johnson MedTech, and CMR Surgical are using the framework for surgical digital twins and endovascular training.
sentences.zh: 包括美敦力 (Medtronic)、强生医疗科技 (Johnson & Johnson MedTech) 和 CMR Surgical 在内的外科机器人公司正在使用该框架进行外科数字孪生和血管内训练。

sentences.en: The catch
sentences.zh: 陷阱

blocks.html_en: The generosity has a logic. Open-sourcing the tools makes Nvidia the standard infrastructure beneath the next generation of surgical robots, all of it running on Nvidia GPUs.

sentences.en: The generosity has a logic.
sentences.zh: 慷慨是有逻辑的。

sentences.en: Open-sourcing the tools makes Nvidia the standard infrastructure beneath the next generation of surgical robots, all of it running on Nvidia GPUs.
sentences.zh: 这些工具的开源使 Nvidia 成为下一代手术机器人的标准基础设施，所有机器人都在 Nvidia GPU 上运行。

blocks.html_en: A simulation is also not a patient.

sentences.en: A simulation is also not a patient.
sentences.zh: 模拟也不是病人。

blocks.html_en: A policy that shines in a digital twin still has to prove itself in an operating theatre, and regulators have yet to say how much synthetic evidence they will accept.

sentences.en: A policy that shines in a digital twin still has to prove itself in an operating theatre, and regulators have yet to say how much synthetic evidence they will accept.
sentences.zh: 在数字孪生中大放异彩的政策仍需在手术室中证明自己，监管机构尚未表示他们将接受多少综合证据。

blocks.html_en: Still, the direction is striking. The bottleneck in medical AI has been data, not ideas, and Nvidia has just handed the field a way around it, for free. If regulators agree that a robot trained in a virtual body is safe in a real one, the two-minute rehearsal could become the way surgical machines are built.

sentences.en: Still, the direction is striking.
sentences.zh: 尽管如此，这个方向还是引人注目的。

sentences.en: The bottleneck in medical AI has been data, not ideas, and Nvidia has just handed the field a way around it, for free.
sentences.zh: 医疗人工智能的瓶颈一直是数据，而不是想法，而英伟达刚刚免费为该领域提供了一条绕过这一瓶颈的方法。

sentences.en: If regulators agree that a robot trained in a virtual body is safe in a real one, the two-minute rehearsal could become the way surgical machines are built.
sentences.zh: 如果监管机构同意在虚拟身体中训练的机器人在真实身体中是安全的，那么两分钟的排练可能会成为手术机器的制造方式。

content_html_zh:
医疗机器人技术的难点不是机器人。 这就是实践。 外科手术系统需要数千次尝试才能完成一项微妙的任务，而你无法在真实的患者身上运行这些任务。 英伟达认为答案是让机器人在模拟体内排练数百万次。

据 HIT Consultant 报道，该公司发布了开源医学物理模拟框架，这是其 Isaac for Healthcare 平台的一部分。 它模拟了仪器如何与解剖学相互作用，因此开发人员可以在接触硬件之前对物理人工智能策略进行训练和压力测试。

速度是头条新闻。 Nvidia 声称，通过在 GPU 上并行运行 8,192 个训练环境，速度得到了惊人的提升。 它将机器人政策培训从超过五个小时缩短到不到两分钟。 这就是通宵工作和喝咖啡休息时间的区别。

更重要的部分是模拟产生的结果：证据。 由于框架是开放的，开发人员可以看到数据、模型和权重。 他们可以用它们来建立医疗监管机构要求的可验证的证据。

两种物理

该框架融合了两种方法。 经典物理学通过 Nvidia 的 Warp 和 Newton 引擎对硬力学进行建模：摩擦、接触以及组织对导管或导丝的阻力。

生成人工智能物理学，来自一个名为 Cosmos-H Dreams 的模型，可以预测更混乱的东西，比如软组织如何变形。 它甚至可以模拟透视、X 射线和超声波。

谁已经在使用它

这些名字赋予了它重量。 包括美敦力 (Medtronic)、强生医疗科技 (Johnson & Johnson MedTech) 和 CMR Surgical 在内的外科机器人公司正在使用该框架进行外科数字孪生和血管内训练。

CMR Surgical 首席技术官 Chris Fryer 表示，开源模式让企业“以共享知识为基础，加速负责任的创新”。

陷阱

慷慨是有逻辑的。 这些工具的开源使 Nvidia 成为下一代手术机器人的标准基础设施，所有机器人都在 Nvidia GPU 上运行。

模拟也不是病人。

在数字孪生中大放异彩的政策仍需在手术室中证明自己，监管机构尚未表示他们将接受多少综合证据。

尽管如此，这个方向还是引人注目的。 医疗人工智能的瓶颈一直是数据，而不是想法，而英伟达刚刚免费为该领域提供了一条绕过这一瓶颈的方法。 如果监管机构同意在虚拟身体中训练的机器人在真实身体中是安全的，那么两分钟的排练可能会成为手术机器的制造方式。
